channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: Frustrated Townsend proud of Scotland effort in defeat to So…

item.title: After a months-long occupation, Minnesota is still recoverin…
item.author: Governor Tim Walz (@governorwalz.mn.gov)
item.description:
After a months-long occupation, Minnesota is still recovering from a retribution campaign waged by the federal government.

Now, Minnesota stands with Houston in demanding accountability for the fatal shooting of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo. This bloodshed cannot be normalized.
item.content:encoded:
After a months-long occupation, Minnesota is still recovering from a retribution campaign waged by the federal government.

Now, Minnesota stands with Houston in demanding accountability for the fatal shooting of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo. This bloodshed cannot be normalized.

item.title: Kids today have lost the fine art of bullshitting a 10 page …
item.author: Amy Mode Activated 🪷 ᓚᘏᗢ ಇ. (@activateamymode.bsky.social)
item.description: Kids today have lost the fine art of bullshitting a 10 page paper from a single Funk & Wagnalls entry or from reading only the CliffsNotes. 🤣
item.content:encoded: Kids today have lost the fine art of bullshitting a 10 page paper from a single Funk & Wagnalls entry or from reading only the CliffsNotes. 🤣

item.title: Norway pay their female international players the same amoun…
item.author: Lee Hurley (@hleehurley.com)
item.description: Norway pay their female international players the same amount as their male players and have done since 2017.
item.content:encoded: Norway pay their female international players the same amount as their male players and have done since 2017.

item.title: Many schools rely on consumer fees funneled through the fede…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Many schools rely on consumer fees funneled through the federal government to cut internet costs. FCC Chairman Brendan Carr called for ending this program before Donald Trump tapped him for the job.
item.content:encoded: Many schools rely on consumer fees funneled through the federal government to cut internet costs. FCC Chairman Brendan Carr called for ending this program before Donald Trump tapped him for the job.

item.title: Egypt fans being pulled aside, patted down, and double-check…
item.author: Raider (@iwillnotbesilenced.bsky.social)
item.description:
Egypt fans being pulled aside, patted down, and double-checked before the Argentina vs.
Egypt match, while Argentina supporters were allowed to walk through security without the same level of screening. And this is exactly why people keep accusing FIFA of double standards.
item.content:encoded:
Egypt fans being pulled aside, patted down, and double-checked before the Argentina vs.
Egypt match, while Argentina supporters were allowed to walk through security without the same level of screening. And this is exactly why people keep accusing FIFA of double standards.

item.title: Used the same loud noise video to find the bud again. It was…
item.author: YurilyArt ユリリ＠創作百合 #CommsOpen (@yurilyart.bsky.social)
item.description:
Used the same loud noise video to find the bud again. It was under the couch. No wonder I saw Kitty playing there earlier today.

I had to put up a good sweat to get it since it was very deep under it this time.
item.content:encoded:
Used the same loud noise video to find the bud again. It was under the couch. No wonder I saw Kitty playing there earlier today.

I had to put up a good sweat to get it since it was very deep under it this time.

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム 就活の集団面接で「初任給で何を買いたいですか？」と聞かれ、とっさに「…まくら？」と答え落ちてしまっ…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
就活の集団面接で「初任給で何を買いたいですか？」と聞かれ、とっさに「…まくら？」と答え落ちてしまった体験漫画に「どうすれば良かったか」と反応集まる

もずく@がんばってはたらく @mozuku_zqu がんばってはたらきながら漫画を描いている人です(´ω｀) 書籍、LINEスタンプなどこちら→ linktr.ee/mozuku_zqu ぼやき→ @mozuku_boyaki ご依頼等はメールへお願いします(×DM)✉️mozuku.zqu@gmail.com おしごとたくさん募集中
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
就活の集団面接で「初任給で何を買いたいですか？」と聞かれ、とっさに「…まくら？」と答え落ちてしまった体験漫画に「どうすれば良かったか」と反応集まる

もずく@がんばってはたらく @mozuku_zqu がんばってはたらきながら漫画を描いている人です(´ω｀) 書籍、LINEスタンプなどこちら→ linktr.ee/mozuku_zqu ぼやき→ @mozuku_boyaki ご依頼等はメールへお願いします(×DM)✉️mozuku.zqu@gmail.com おしごとたくさん募集中

item.title: Poor Roxy got attacked by someone’s asshole dog. Came chargi…
item.author: Stoned Yeti 👽 (@stonedmcyeti.bsky.social)
item.description:
Poor Roxy got attacked by someone’s asshole dog. Came charging at us, but Roxy got in between myself and the other dog, and fucked it up. She is and will
Always be a good girl. 🐶
item.content:encoded:
Poor Roxy got attacked by someone’s asshole dog. Came charging at us, but Roxy got in between myself and the other dog, and fucked it up. She is and will
Always be a good girl. 🐶

item.title: He woke up before sunrise, just like he did every workday. H…
item.author: Alt National Park Service (@altnps.bsky.social)
item.description: He woke up before sunrise, just like he did every workday. His wife made him breakfast. He kissed her goodbye, grabbed his lunch and work boots, patted his dog, and climbed into the white van he used to take his construction crew to work.
item.content:encoded: He woke up before sunrise, just like he did every workday. His wife made him breakfast. He kissed her goodbye, grabbed his lunch and work boots, patted his dog, and climbed into the white van he used to take his construction crew to work.

item.title: You're going to get left behind if you don't use Al." Leave…
item.author: Jon of The North (@krauza.bsky.social)
item.description:
You're going to get left behind if you don't use Al."

Leave me then. Leave me with my critical thinking skills, my ability to read and write long- form, and books without needing Al summaries.
item.content:encoded:
You're going to get left behind if you don't use Al."

Leave me then. Leave me with my critical thinking skills, my ability to read and write long- form, and books without needing Al summaries.

item.title: Admired for its regal blue lace-like crest and mesmerizing …
item.author: Eloise Powers (@elnopower.bsky.social)
item.description:
Admired for its regal blue lace-like crest and mesmerizing red eyes.

The Victoria Crowned Pigeon, native to New Guinea, is the world's largest living pigeon. Its graceful beauty and deep calls make it one of the region's most remarkable birds.
Scientific Name
Goura victoria

📷 B. Sharma
item.content:encoded:
Admired for its regal blue lace-like crest and mesmerizing red eyes.

The Victoria Crowned Pigeon, native to New Guinea, is the world's largest living pigeon. Its graceful beauty and deep calls make it one of the region's most remarkable birds.
Scientific Name
Goura victoria

📷 B. Sharma

item.description:

🗒 C#

ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.
item.content:encoded:
📦 dotnet / aspnetcore
⭐ 38,268 (+69)
🗒 C#

ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

item.title: 今日あったお客様が俺女の子みんな好き！っていってたのが本当に耳に残っていて、 あ、一人じゃなくてみんな好きでいいんだ！！…
item.author: やまだいおり🐮とうぱに新宿御苑 (@panicyamada.bsky.social)
item.description:
今日あったお客様が俺女の子みんな好き！っていってたのが本当に耳に残っていて、
あ、一人じゃなくてみんな好きでいいんだ！！って勉強になりました。
item.content:encoded:
今日あったお客様が俺女の子みんな好き！っていってたのが本当に耳に残っていて、
あ、一人じゃなくてみんな好きでいいんだ！！って勉強になりました。

item.title: Bernoulli has been a champ in his cone while recovering from…
item.author: Bunsen, Beaker, Bernoulli, & Brix (@bunsenbernerbmd.bsky.social)
item.description:
Bernoulli has been a champ in his cone while recovering from being neutered, but yesterday he was sadly whining.
In a small little moment, Bunsen tried his best to comfort him.
😫❤️

🎥 Bunsen and Bernoulli
item.content:encoded:

item.title: He really is a charming guy. From his masculinity-defying d…
item.author: Montreal Mike🇨🇦 (@mikemontreal.bsky.social)
item.description:
He really is a charming guy. From his masculinity-defying designer handbags to his goofy sense of humour, he’s a delight.

The whole Norwegian team is just a bunch of very handsome and fun loving chaps who seem to be enjoying every second.
#fifa #Norway

www.cbc.ca/news/world/e...
item.content:encoded:

item.title: I hate when something peaks your interest and you want to re…
item.author: VeronicaAG (@veronicatess.bsky.social)
item.description: I hate when something peaks your interest and you want to read the whole article, click on it and they make you create an account as in sign up for their publication before they let you read it 🤨 Nope
item.content:encoded: I hate when something peaks your interest and you want to read the whole article, click on it and they make you create an account as in sign up for their publication before they let you read it 🤨 Nope

item.title: Pigeon
item.author: Basil 🌱 (@basil-mage.bsky.social)
item.description: Pigeon
item.content:encoded: Pigeon
